steps_completed.task: Add selectedMarketId state to MarketDetail and wire ForceDirectedGraph onNodeClick to update it, passing selectedMarketId to CptPanel so clicking a graph node shows that node's CPT

Integrate useAnimationPropagation into ForceDirectedGraph: import the hook, apply CSS animation classes to SVG node/edge elements based on animatingNodes/animatingEdges sets, port CSS keyframes (evidence-pulse, propagation-arrive, edge-flow) and SVG filter definitions from BayesNetGraph

Create GraphToolbar component with export button (calls downloadJson from networkExport), import button (hidden file input + readAndValidateFile from networkImport), and graph view toggle (force-directed vs circular)

Integrate GraphToolbar into MarketDetail page: render above the graph area, connect import success to React Query cache invalidation for graph data refresh, wire view toggle state to conditionally render ForceDirectedGraph or BayesNetGraph

Connect assumption changes to trigger propagation animation in ForceDirectedGraph: listen to assumptions prop changes and call triggerAnimation with the evidence node ID when assumptions are added/changed
Verify useUndoRedoKeyboard is active within ForceDirectedGraph context, ensure keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+Z, Ctrl+Shift+Z) work when graph is focused, add integration tests for the full workflow
